original: 哲学家(00:36:08): I have to.But I don't want to go to toilet.I don't enjoy going to toilet, but I have to, my body says go to toilet.I go to toilet.Yes, yeah, but I don't enjoy it.Yes, no, Yes, I have to do.I have to take going the traffic in Moscow to go to someplace I don't like.
translation: 哲学家(00:36:08): 我必须去。但我不想去厕所。我不喜欢上厕所，但我必须去，我的身体告诉我该去厕所了。我就去厕所了。是的，没错，但我不喜欢这样。是的，不，是的，我必须这么做。我必须忍受莫斯科的交通，去某个我不喜欢的地方。
